name: geo-countries
title: Country Polygons as GeoJSON
description: Geodata package providing GeoJSON polygons for all the world's countries and territories.

licenses.name: ODC-PDDL-1.0
licenses.title: Open Data Commons Public Domain Dedication and License v1.0

resources.name: countries
resources.description: GeoJSON FeatureCollection of country and territory polygons generated from Natural Earth's default de facto Admin 0 countries dataset.

fields.name: name
fields.description: Common name of the country or territory

fields.name: ISO3166-1-Alpha-2
fields.description: 2-letter ISO 3166-1 country code. Set to "-99" for features that have no assigned ISO code.

fields.name: ISO3166-1-Alpha-3
fields.description: 3-letter ISO 3166-1 country code. Set to "-99" for features that have no assigned ISO code.

resources.name: countries-de-jure-usa
resources.description: GeoJSON FeatureCollection of country and territory polygons generated from Natural Earth's de jure Admin 0 countries point-of-view dataset for the USA POV.

fields.name: name
fields.description: Common name of the country or territory

fields.name: ISO3166-1-Alpha-2
fields.description: 2-letter ISO 3166-1 country code. Set to "-99" for features that have no assigned ISO code.

fields.name: ISO3166-1-Alpha-3
fields.description: 3-letter ISO 3166-1 country code. Set to "-99" for features that have no assigned ISO code.
